meta.description: Synthetic dummy attack pattern for cybersecurity simulation in Docker environments
meta.warning: FOR SIMULATION USE ONLY — Do not use against real infrastructure

name: DNS Hijacking
description: Attacker poisons DNS responses to redirect legitimate domain queries to malicious IP addresses.

attack_stages.action: ARP spoof gateway to intercept DNS UDP/53 traffic
Forge DNS reply with attacker-controlled IP before real resolver responds
Victim browsers/apps connect to fake server
Capture credentials via fake login portal

indicators_of_compromise: DNS TTL values suddenly very low
Multiple NXDOMAIN followed by sudden resolution
